data.title: Review and calibrate skogix preference profile
data.description:
## Summary

Review `people/skogix.md` against current preferences and remove stale assumptions so autonomous behavior stays aligned with the operator.

## Context

This is currently a local `gptodo` task only. Converting it into an issue makes it easier to handle as a scoped worktree/PR task when the time is right.

## Acceptance Criteria

* current preferences and hard constraints are reviewed with skogix
* stale assumptions are removed or downgraded
* any meaningful preference changes are reflected in `people/skogix.md` and optionally summarized in the journal
